results.title: ‘Forever interwoven within our Springfield story’: Hundreds rally in support of Haitians after TPS decision
results.description: Hundreds of people gathered on the Springfield City Hall Plaza in a massive show of support for the Haitian community Thursday evening, June 25, after a U.S. Supreme Court decision

results.title: Haitians in the region could face deportation after Supreme Court ruling
results.description: The court ruled the Trump administration could move forward to end temporary protected status, a program which allowed area Haitians to live and work here.
